events.title: Dark and Darker: A Dark Comedy Show
events.description: A comedy showcase leaning into darker, edgier material at Cobb's, 915 Columbus Ave.

events.title: Brent Morin
events.description: Stand-up comedian Brent Morin performs at Cobb's, 915 Columbus Ave.

events.title: San Francisco Art Book Fair
events.description: Minnesota Street Project Foundation presents the 2026 SF Art Book Fair — independent publishers, zines, and artist books. 6–10 PM at 1201 Minnesota St.

events.title: San Francisco Art Book Fair — Preview Night
events.description: Second free evening of the 2026 SF Art Book Fair at Minnesota Street Project Foundation (1150 25th St / 1275 Minnesota St). 6–10 PM.

events.title: Tommy Brennan
events.description: Stand-up comedian Tommy Brennan opens a multi-night run at Cobb's, 915 Columbus Ave, continuing at Punch Line SF July 25.

events.title: Dance Fridays – Salsa & Bachata
events.description: Weekly SF Latin dance party: beginner lessons at 7:45 PM, then social dancing until 1:30 AM across two rooms. 21+.

events.title: AVOTCJA & MODUPUE
events.description: Poetry, percussion, violin, saxophone, bass, and talking drum in a genre-blurring live set at this beloved Glen Park bookstore-venue.

events.title: Tommy Brennan
events.description: Stand-up comedian Tommy Brennan continues his run at Punch Line SF, 444 Battery St.

events.title: James McMurtry
events.description: Veteran Texas singer-songwriter James McMurtry, known for sharp, novelistic lyrics. Doors 8 PM.

events.title: Ringo Deathstarr — Soundwall Festival 2026
events.description: Shoegaze veterans Ringo Deathstarr headline a Soundwall Festival 2026 bill with Suzy Clue, Her New Knife, Blossom, Starling, and Misandrist. Doors 5 PM.

events.title: Big Brave & Cel Genesis
events.description: Montreal experimental heavy trio Big Brave co-headlines with Cel Genesis at Bottom of the Hill.

events.title: Monthly El Rio
events.description: El Rio's recurring monthly gathering on the venue's iconic outdoor patio — live music, DJs, and the neighborhood's long-running queer bar scene.

events.title: SF Comedy Showcase
events.description: Rotating lineup of stand-up comedians at Punch Line SF's regular showcase night.

events.title: Parts and Labor, evicshen, HLLLYH
events.description: Three-band experimental/noise-rock bill at Bottom of the Hill.

events.title: Monsieur Periné — SFJAZZ Summer Sessions: Tropical Charm
events.description: 2015 Latin GRAMMY Best New Artist winner Monsieur Periné (Bogotá) blends French jazz manouche with Latin American dance rhythms. Multi-night run July 30–Aug 2 as part of SFJAZZ's Tropical Charm program.
